summary.what: Hardened parseVars with duplicate-key check and fixed just decision-log pipeline idiom per review
summary.why: Silent last-wins on duplicate --var keys is a footgun under scripting; the original '|| true' outside the $() was fragile in interaction with pipefail
summary.how: Added duplicate-key guard in parseVars with table-driven test coverage. Moved fallback into pipeline as '|| echo ""' so empty-file and no-match cases are unambiguous.
